START ITER 1

# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x11, x0, -1
addiw x10, x11, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

pc             0x800001fc	0x800001fc <test_end>

START ITER 2

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x10, x0, 1
addiw x11, x10, -2048
# Result: a1 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFF801

============
START ITER 3

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0x6000000000000000
csrw tdata1, x10
csrr x10, tdata1
# Result: a0 = 0x6000000000000000

priv           0x3	prv:3 [Machine]
pc             0x80000204	0x80000204 <test_end>
a0             0x6000000000000000	6917529027641081856
a1             0x0	0
a2             0x0	0
a3             0x0	0
t0             0x0	0
t1             0x0	0

ft1            {float = 0, double = 0}	(raw 0x0000000000000000)
ft2            {float = 0, double = 0}	(raw 0x0000000000000000)
ft3            {float = 0, double = 0}	(raw 0x0000000000000000)

============
START ITER 4

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x10, x0, 0x6000000000000000
csrw 0x7a1, x10
addi x10, x0, 0x80000122
csrw 0x7a2, x10
and x10, x10, x10
# Result: mcause = 0x3

bootloader/code.S: Assembler messages:
bootloader/code.S:103: Error: illegal operands `addi x10,x0,0x6000000000000000'
bootloader/code.S:105: Error: illegal operands `addi x10,x0,0x80000122'
make: *** [Makefile:55: bootloader/code.o] Error 1

END ITER 4
==========
